name_en: (With full set of packaging)!!️ The Ophidia series blends the essence of GG tradition with modern design to present a brilliant new creation. This series incorporates two classic details: woven strips and double-G accessories, reinterpreting creative shapes and sizes in the early autumn collection. This men's small shoulder bag effortlessly embodies the subtle beauty of lines. It features an internal pocket and a detachable shoulder strap, adding extra charm to the design.

Color: Brown PVC。
